name: Thunder Lance Flip Caliber Phoenix Shot

issues.description: Condition must check 'HasRestingDon >= 2' or equivalent to verify 'you have 2 or more rested Characters'. Current condition 'Always' ignores the rested character requirement entirely.

KO action target scope is incorrect. Should be 'OpponentCharacter' (automatic selection respecting maxCost constraint), not 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' (manual choice). The card says 'up to 1', implying automatic targeting within constraints.

Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and Rest action has no clear purpose and does not match card text. This entire effect should be removed—the card only describes a single KO effect conditional on rested characters.
Action must respect 'up to 1' by setting a limit. If KO action doesn't support quantity limits natively, consider using a 'maxTargets':1 constraint.
